name: preflight
description: Universal pre-flight planner for Catalyst engineering tasks. Classifies tasks as trivial/standard/high-stake, acquires evidence via probe primitives (jira-compare, Atlassian MCP, ads-validator), runs 5-advisor council deliberation when warranted, and produces phased plans with mandatory ADS/TDD/ask-before-add gates and re-probe loops. Replaces ad-hoc planning at session start.
